name: skillscout-root
description: Root package.json to prevent Render from incorrectly detecting Rust

scripts.build: node -e "console.error('Error: You must configure Render to use backend or frontend as the Root Directory. See Settings -> Build & Deploy.'); process.exit(1);"
scripts.start: node -e "console.error('Error: You must configure Render to use backend or frontend as the Root Directory. See Settings -> Build & Deploy.'); process.exit(1);"
